webp

Class WebpParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.AbstractImageParser<TifMetadata>
      • webp.WebpParser

  • public class WebpParser
extends AbstractImageParser<TifMetadata>
    This concrete class implements AbstractImageParser for extracting metadata from WebP image files using a RIFF container chunk parsing architecture.

    This parser loads metadata by inspecting RIFF chunks sequentially. It then extracts Exif blocks embedded within TIFF structures and XMP metadata packets.

    WebP Data Stream Layout

    The WebP file format is built on the RIFF container, beginning with a fixed signature: 

      RIFF + FileSize (4 bytes) + WEBP

    This header is followed by a sequence of chunks. Each chunk includes:

    • 4 bytes: Chunk FourCC (ASCII, case-sensitive, e.g., VP8 , VP8X, Exif)
    • 4 bytes: Chunk payload size (unsigned, little-endian, 32-bit integer)
    • Payload: Variable-length data bytes
    • Padding: If the size is odd, a single zero padding byte follows (not counted in the size field)

    Core Chunk Types (Mandatory)

    • VP8 – Lossy bitstream (standard framework)
    • VP8L – Lossless bitstream
    • VP8X – Extended format chunk (required for metadata and animation attributes)

    Optional Chunk Types

    • Exif – Embedded EXIF metadata (Note: Mixed case)
    • ICCP – Embedded ICC color profile
    • Xmp – Embedded XMP metadata (Note: Mixed case with a trailing space)
    • ANIM / ANMF – Animation control and frame headers

    Chunk Processing Rules

    • Only chunks specified in the filtering criteria are read into memory.
    • An empty filter list disables chunk extraction entirely.
    • A null configuration results in all chunk segments being extracted.

    When the Exif chunk is isolated, its payload array is parsed as TIFF/EXIF-formatted metadata to extract image attributes like orientation, timestamps, and camera profiles.

    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.4
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs
    See Also:
    WebP RIFF Container Specification

    • Method Detail

      • readMetadata

        public void readMetadata()
        Parses WebP structural chunks to load EXIF and XMP metadata segments.

        This method implements a soft-landing strategy. If a chunk payload is corrupted and throws an unhandled runtime exception, the failure is caught upstream. However, this method guarantees that the parser's state flag is updated via a finally block to prevent redundant disk read actions on subsequent queries.

        Specified by:
        readMetadata in class AbstractImageParser<TifMetadata>

      • getMetadata

        public TifMetadata getMetadata()
        Retrieves the extracted metadata from the WebP image file. If the metadata has not been explicitly loaded yet, it triggers lazy execution to read data.
        Specified by:
        getMetadata in class AbstractImageParser<TifMetadata>
        Returns:
        the TIFF metadata container holding WebP data payload

      • getImageFormat

        public DigitalSignature getImageFormat()
        Returns the detected WebP format.
        Specified by:
        getImageFormat in class AbstractImageParser<TifMetadata>
        Returns:
        a DigitalSignature enum class

        Returns:
        a formatted string suitable for diagnostics, logging, or inspection
